preview.title: Magnet Content Preview
preview.subtitle: Check files and magnet details before downloading
preview.previewImageLoaded: Preview image extracted from the search source and integrated into the magnet file preview.
preview.previewImageFallback: No preview image is available for this result, so a file-type preview marker is shown.
preview.noFiles: No file list is available. Copy the magnet link into your downloader to inspect details.

status.renderFailed: This file cannot be played in the built-in player: {error}
status.localEngineHint: The built-in player uses the local rqbit BT engine. First playback may wait for metadata and peers; if rqbit is missing, place rqbit.exe next to the app or set RQBIT_PATH.
status.unsupportedFormat: The system WebView does not support this file format or codec. Use Open stream to play it in the system player.
status.noNativePlayableFile: Files were resolved, but no MP4/WebM/audio file is directly playable in WebView. Select a file and use Open stream.
status.noPlayableFile: No browser-playable media file was found. Select another file from the list if available.
status.noFiles: No file list is available yet. Waiting for magnet metadata.

messages.playStarted: Magnet link copied and built-in player opened.
messages.playStartedCopyFallback: Built-in player opened. Automatic copy failed, but playback can still continue.
messages.copyFailed: Copy failed. Select the magnet link and copy it manually.
